title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
ABOUT PLAUD AI

PLAUD AI is a pioneering AI-native hardware and software company that turns meetings and conversations into actionable insights with AI devices like PLAUD NOTE and PLAUD NotePin. By recording, transcribing, and summarizing real-life conversations, our solutions boost productivity and save time. Designed for precision and flexibility, whether in meetings or on the go, our products empower you to focus on creative, high-value work while AI handles the details.

We are a growing global team of hardware and software experts seeking advanced AI innovations that integrate with real-life user scenarios. Our newly established headquarters in San Francisco will collaborate with our teams in Shenzhen, Beijing, and Tokyo to extend AI benefits to users globally.

Visit https://www.plaud.ai to learn more.

WHY JOIN US

  • Join a skyrocketing team where your impact drives success and your career reaches new heights, along with what we have achieved, as shared below.
  • Global Leadership: Positioned uniquely to lead the future of work by leveraging innovative AI-driven devices and solutions.
  • Founded in December 2021: Bootstrapped, profitable, and experiencing explosive growth.
  • 10x Revenue Growth: Achieved 10x revenue growth for two consecutive years, reaching a $100 million run rate, with expectations for even greater expansion in 2025.
  • Proven Product-Market Fit: Over 700,000 devices shipped globally since November 2023, with users engaging for an average of 30 hours per month to enhance productivity.
  • New Initiatives: Expanding from consumer-focused products to industry-specific solutions and enterprise-level services.
  • Loved by Professionals: Our products are trusted by professionals in sectors such as healthcare and sales, where conversations drive success.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

  • Design and Development: Lead the design, development, and implementation of Python-based projects, ensuring on-time delivery while maintaining high-quality standards.
  • Full Product Lifecycle: Participate in all phases of the product lifecycle—requirements analysis, design, development, and testing—to optimize product performance and enhance user experience.
  • Research and Innovation: Drive research into new technologies to keep products competitive and foster innovation, ensuring alignment with industry trends.
  • Collaboration: Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to implement technical solutions effectively, ensuring seamless integration and performance.
  • Team Development: Lead team-building efforts, promote a culture of technological innovation, and encourage knowledge sharing to strengthen team capabilities.

WHAT YOU WILL BRING

  • Technical Expertise
    High-Performance Application Development: Proficient in designing and developing high-throughput, low-latency applications using Spring Boot (Java) or Python or Golang for web and AI solutions with industry-standard frameworks.
    Design of Large-Scale Business Systems: Extensive hands-on experience in designing and maintaining large-scale business systems, with expertise in system architecture, performance optimization, and ensuring reliable data processing at scale.
  • Project & Team Leadership
    End-to-End Project Management: Strong ability to define project goals, set realistic timelines, and coordinate cross-functional teams to ensure on-time delivery.
    Team Building & Mentorship: 3+ years of experience in recruiting, growing, and leading high-performing teams through positive reinforcement, mutual respect, and leading by example.
  • Problem-Solving & Communication
    Structured & Innovative Thinking: Excellent analytical skills to break down complex problems, paired with creativity to propose and implement practical, cutting-edge solutions.
    Clear & Persuasive Communication: Fluent in English and Mandarin (written and verbal), with a track record of effective collaboration in international, multicultural environments.
  • Growth Mindset
    Continuous Learning: Proactively stays ahead of industry trends, with a passion for exploring and implementing emerging technologies to drive business innovation.
    Adaptability: Thrives in dynamic environments, embracing challenges with a solution-oriented mindset.
